history.qwen_observation: fmt-maven-plugin:2.19 throws NoSuchMethodError on JDK 21 due to an incompatible google-java-format version.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting a step to bump fmt-maven-plugin to 2.23 before upgrading the build to Java 21 resolves the API incompatibility with the JDK 21 compiler, allowing the subsequent build upgrade to succeed.
